target.title: Model-specific prompt under initialized .ndx overrides default
target.test: After initNDX, a deliberately added .ndx/system/modelprompt/<model>.md file must override the seeded default prompt in buildContext.

steps.instruction: Run yarn workspace ndx test -- --test-name-pattern "buildContext prefers model-specific prompt files under initialized .ndx".
steps.expected: The focused node:test invocation exits 0 and the named subtest passes.

target.passCriteria: The developer context contains only the model-specific prompt in the model_instruction section.
